messages.content: Roper等人实验测量了不同燃料的自由射流扩散火焰高度, 并进一步提出了以下常规扩散火焰高度的理论关联式：

$h = k \cdot (\frac{Q}{G})^{1/3}$

其中，h表示火焰高度，k是一个与燃烧过程相关的常数，Q是燃料的热量释放速率，G是燃料的质量释放速率。

这个公式基于射流火焰的燃烧过程假设，即燃料以恒定质量流率释放出来，并在空气中燃烧。

根据实验结果，Roper等人发现不同燃料的火焰高度与燃料的热量释放速率和质量释放速率的1/3次方存在线性关系。这个关系式可以用于预测和比较不同燃料的火焰高度。

需要注意的是，这个关系式仅适用于特定的实验条件和燃料类型，不同的实验条件和燃料类型可能会导致不同的关系式。因此，在实际应用中，需要进行具体实验和分析，以确定适用于具体情况的关系式。

I will give you my paragraphs as follows：Roper等人实验测量了不同燃料的自由射流扩散火焰高度, 并进一步提出了以下常规扩散火焰高度的理论关联式：

Roper et al. conducted experiments to measure the free jet diffusion flame heights of different fuels and further proposed the following empirical formula for the height of conventional diffusion flames:

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper. Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concision and overall readability. When necessary, rewrite the whole sentence. Furthermore, list all modification and explain the reasons to do so in markdown table. Paragraph：Roper et al. conducted experiments to measure the free jet diffusion flame heights of different fuels and further proposed the following empirical formula for the height of conventional diffusion flames:

Roper et al. (year) conducted a series of experiments aimed at measuring the heights of free jet diffusion flames associated with various fuels. Subsequently, they proposed an empirical formula that relates to the estimation of flame heights for conventional diffusion flames. The formula is as follows: 

\[
h = k \cdot \left(\frac{Q}{G}\right)^{1/3}
\]

Where h represents the flame height, k is a constant associated with the combustion process, Q denotes the rate of thermal energy release by the fuel, and G represents the rate of mass release by the fuel. The empirical formula is predicated on the assumption of a steady mass flow rate of fuel released into the surrounding air, wherein combustion occurs. 

It is important to note that the above formula should be employed cautiously, as its applicability is contingent upon specific experimental conditions and fuel characteristics. Different experimental conditions or types of fuels may yield varying results, necessitating the performance of dedicated experiments and analyses to ascertain the suitability of this formula for individual scenarios.

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper. Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concision and overall readability. [33] demonstrated that Equation 1 is applicable for determining the length of counter-diffusion flames.

Mikofski et al. (year) presented findings supporting the applicability of Equation 1 in the determination of counter-diffusion flame lengths.

| Original Sentence                                                  | Modified Sentence                                                 | Explanation                                                                                                                                        |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Mikofski et al. [33] demonstrated                                 | Mikofski et al. (year) presented findings supporting               | Enhancing the academic style by introducing the authors as "Mikofski et al. (year)" instead of just mentioning their surname and publication number. |
| Equation 1 is applicable for determining                         | Equation 1 in the determination of                               | Clarifying the purpose of Equation 1 by specifying its role in determining counter-diffusion flame lengths.                                       |
| the length of counter-diffusion flames                           | counter-diffusion flame lengths.                                 | Conveying the same information in a more concise and clear manner.                                                                                  |

I will give you my paragraphs as follows：为进一步检验方程4是否适用于低气压条件下，不同高度处的火焰区域中心线温度被测量，如图4所示。
To further verify the applicability of Equation 4 under low-pressure conditions, the centerline temperatures of flame regions at different heights were measured, as shown in Figure 4.

Below is a paragraph from an academic paper. Polish the writing to meet the academic style, improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concision and overall readability. Paragraph：To further verify the applicability of Equation 4 under low-pressure conditions, the centerline temperatures of flame regions at different heights were measured, as shown in Figure 4.

In order to further investigate the suitability of Equation 4 under low-pressure conditions, the researchers measured the centerline temperatures of flame regions at various heights. These temperature measurements were documented and are depicted in Figure 4.

| Original Sentence                                           | Modified Sentence                                                | Explanation                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| To further verify the applicability of Equation 4           | In order to further investigate the suitability of Equation 4     | Enhancing the academic style by using "In order to" instead of "To further verify" to convey the purpose of the research more effectively.                                                     |
| under low-pressure conditions                               | under low-pressure conditions                                    | Maintaining the original phrase as it already meets the standards of academic style and readability.                                                                                              |
| the centerline temperatures of flame regions at different heights were measured                                         | the researchers measured the centerline temperatures of flame regions at various heights                                    | Rewriting the sentence to provide a more concise and clear description of the research methodology.                                                                                              |
| as shown in Figure 4.                                       | These temperature measurements were documented and are depicted in Figure 4.   | Replacing the original phrase with a more comprehensive statement that explains the documentation and representation of the temperature measurements in Figure 4.                                   |

However, the overall change in flame temperature is minimal. When the pressure is lowered from 97.75 kPa to 61.66 kPa, the flame temperature at different heights only decreases by approximately 20 K.
假设压力为97.75 kPa和61.66 kPa的火焰温度分别为1120 K和1100 K，压力为97.75 kPa和61.66 kPa的火焰高度比值可以估算如下:

Assuming that the flame temperatures at pressures of 97.75 kPa and 61.66 kPa are 1120 K and 1100 K, respectively, the ratio of flame heights at pressures of 97.75 kPa and 61.66 kPa can be estimated as follows:
计算结果表明火焰长度几乎和压力无关
The calculation results indicate that the flame length is nearly independent of pressure.
这明显和实验结果相矛盾
This is clearly contradictory to the experimental results.

The disparity between the theoretical estimation and experimental measurement might be attributed to varying definitions or measurements of flame height, including image flame height and stoichiometric flame height.

|------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| This discrepancy between theoretical estimation       | The disparity between the theoretical estimation                         | Revising the word "discrepancy" to "disparity" to improve academic style and maintain consistency in language usage.                               |
| and experimental measurement                          | and experimental measurement                                              | Retaining the original phrase as it already adheres to academic style and readability.                                                            |

I want you to act as a scientific Chinese-English translator, I will provide you with some paragraphs in one language and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial itntelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply. I will give you my paragraphs as follows：我们的实验是在非受限空间开展，过量空气系数得到精准控制，火焰到壁面的辐射会反过来影响火焰温度，进一步导致影响燃烧化学反应过程。然而，roper与Mikofski 等人的实验均在非受限空间开展

Our experiments were conducted in an unconfined space, with precise control over the excess air coefficient. The radiative heat transfer from the flame to the walls, in turn, impacts the flame temperature and further influences the combustion chemical reactions. However, both Roper and Mikofski et al. conducted their experiments in unconfined spaces.

我们的实验是在非受限空间进行的，在这种环境中我们可以精确控制过量空气系数。火焰辐射热传递到壁面对火焰温度产生影响，并进一步影响燃烧化学反应过程。然而，Roper和Mikofski等人的实验也是在非受限空间进行的。
先前的实验是在非受限空间开展被 roper等人

The previous experiments conducted by Roper et al. were carried out in an unconfined space.

Roper等人进行的先前实验是在非受限空间进行的。

Note: The translation provided is a direct and accurate translation of the given sentence.
